title: Application - Update from previous app version while using guest account (TBD)
scenario: App update from previous version fails or behaves unexpectedly when using a guest account in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the app is logged in using a Guest account.
3. Navigate to Account settings and confirm the account type is set to Guest.
5. Go to the Google Play Store and check for available updates for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. If an update is available, tap 'Update' to install the latest version.
7. Wait for the update to complete and the app to re-launch.
8. Observe the app state after the update.
expected: The app should successfully update and launch, retaining the Guest account session. The user should remain logged in as Guest with no data loss or forced login prompts.
